user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new out time request settings, so that personal out time is limited by policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Out Time Request Settings screen; When I click Add new out time request settings and define the maximum requests, maximum duration and maximum hours per month; Then the settings are saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the maximum personal out time requests and hours per month, so that out time usage stays within limits
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring out time request settings; When I enter the maximum personal out time requests per month and maximum hours per month; Then these limits are enforced for employees

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure out time settings as employee class specific, so that limits can differ by employee class
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring out time request settings; When I set the employee class specific option and save; Then the limits apply per employee class

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit existing out time request settings, so that I can adjust limits over time
acceptance_criteria: Given an out time request setting is listed; When I click Edit and update the limits; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the out time request settings list, so that I always see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Out Time Request Settings screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
